title: Performance Standard Metric
description: Performance metrics that support rate thresholds on media buys — the verification subset of the broader metric vocabulary. Each metric specifies whether its threshold is a floor (must exceed) or ceiling (must not exceed). Shared values with `available-metric.json` mirror the delivery vocabulary (`viewability` → `viewable_rate` family, `completion_rate` → same name); verification-only values (`ivt`, `brand_safety`, `attention_score`) are typically vendor-attested and do not appear in `available-metric.json` because they're not seller-reportable scalars — they flow through `vendor_metric_values` or vendor-scope `committed_metrics` entries with the matching `performance_standard.vendor` BrandRef anchoring identity.

enumDescriptions.viewability: Viewable impression rate (floor — must exceed threshold). Requires viewability_standard. Denominator: measurable_impressions.
enumDescriptions.ivt: Invalid Traffic rate (ceiling — must not exceed threshold). Denominator: total_impressions.
enumDescriptions.completion_rate: Video or audio completion rate (floor — must exceed threshold). Denominator: total_impressions.
enumDescriptions.brand_safety: Brand-safe impression rate (floor — must exceed threshold). Denominator: total_impressions.
enumDescriptions.attention_score: Attention score rate (floor — must exceed threshold). Denominator: measurable_impressions.
